titleStmt.title: SII 8.709: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 709. (A.R. No. 393 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī— cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kopperu
ñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu 3vatu me[ṣa]nāyaṟṟu tiyati
nāliṉāl taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr veḷḷaṟaik kavuciya
ṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
pañcākṣaratevaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ ve
ḷḷaṟaik kavuciyaṉ cipañcākṣara
tevaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉum Ivaṉe mutukaṇṇāka Uṭai
ya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi tirukkaḻippā
laiuṭaiyāṉ piḷḷaiyāṇṭiyum ve
ḷḷaṟaik kavuciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉ śrīpañcākṣaratevaṉai mutukaṇṇāka U
ṭaiya Ivaṉ mātā veḷḷaṟaika kaviciyaṉ tiru
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ pirāmaṇi centaṉ tat
taiyum veḷḷaṟai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
centaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ veḷḷaṟai kkaviciyaṉ
centaṉ tillaināyakaṉum Ivaṉaiye mutuka
ṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi ceṉṉittaḻu
mpaṉ tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāḷum Ivavaṉai
vom kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉukku nāṅkaḷ nilaivilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu
kuṭutta paricāvatu [.] nāṅkaḷ Ivaṉukku Ivā
ṭṭai miṉanāyaṟṟu tiyati Irupattāṟināl viṟ
ṟu vilaittaravu Eḻutikkuṭuttu Itukku Iṟṟainā
ḷāl vilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu Eḻutikkuṭukkum ni
lam . Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai maturāntakapper Iḷamai
nāṭṭu paḷḷipaṭaiyāṉa vikkiramacoḻana[l*lūr] pā
l cuntaracoḻavatikku kiḻakku kaṇṭarātittavā
ku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutalcatirattu kāk
kaipātti yeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattukku El
lai . cuṉtaracoḻavatikku kiḻakkum kaṇṇāṟṟu vāy
kkālukku teṟkum piṭāri vaṭavāyil celvi nila
ttiṉukku meṟkum vaṭameṟkum piramicuramuṭaiya
mātevar nilattiṉukku vaṭakkum Āka Icainta
Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Uḷḷiṭṭa caturattuḷavā
ka mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nattamum kuḷamum Uḷppa
ṭa vanta nilam vaupa Iṉnilam Eḻumāvum Itil Uḷ
paṭṭa teṅku puḷiuḷḷiṭṭa palluruvil payaṉ maraṅkaḷumku
ḷattil kiḻnirum mel nirum Iṟaikka Uṭaiya tulaiyum nilai
yum Iṉnilattukku mulaolaipaṭikaḷālum pottakapaṭikaḷālum Uḷ
ḷa Uṭaimaikaḷum Urimaikaḷumā
ka Ittaṉaiyu maṟṟu moḻiviṉṟi
tayāy viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷ
vatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaippo
ruḷ ḷaṉṟāṭucellum naṟkācu
2 10000 8 1000 Ikkācu Irupatteṇṇāyi
ramum Uṭaiyom Uṭaiyapaṭi Ā
vaṇikkaḷiriye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccela va
ṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaip piramāṇattiṭ
ṭuk kuṭuttom Inta kaviciyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyāṉukku muṟcollappaṭṭa Ivavaṉai
vom . Iṉnilattukku Ituve vilai Āvatākavu
m vilaippiramāṇamum poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ
cilaōlaiyum Ituve Āvutākavum . Ituvallatu
veṟu porumāvaṟutip poruṭcila Olaikāṭṭa kaṭa
vatallātutākavum . Iṉnilattukku vanta taṭai
yum Iṭaiyūṟum tirttu Āḻvippataṟkku Eṅkaḷ
vāḻvey Āḻcci Iṟaippuṇai Ā(ḻ)vutākavum .
Iṉnilattukku paḻampaṭi pāyum nir pāyavum vā
rumnir vāravum Iṟaikkum nir Iṟaikkavum peṟu
vatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu muṟkūṟi tanta kācu I
rupat teṇṇāyiramum Uṭaiyom Uṭaiyapaṭi A
ṟakkoṇṭu muṟkuṟitta mikutik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅ
ka nilamum nattamum kuḷamum Uḷḷiṭṭu vanta nilam
Eḻumāvum nilam muḷḷiṭṭa me(r)nokkiṉa teṅku
m puḷi Uḷḷiṭṭa palluruvil payaṉmaraṅkaḷum kiḻkuḷat
tu kiḻnirum menirum Iṟaikka Uṭaiya tulaiyum ni
laiyum maṟṟu mulaRead mula ōlaippaṭikaḷālum as in line 40.vilaippaṭikaḷālum pottakappaṭi
yālum vanta Uṭaimaikaḷum Urimaikaḷum Uḷḷi
ṭṭaRead uḷppaṭa.viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇattiṭṭu kuṭuttom I
nta kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ śrī
pañcākṣaratevaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ veḷḷaṟai kaviciyaṉ
śrīpañcākṣaratevaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉum
Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ pirāma
ṇi tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉ piḷḷaiyāṇṭiyum Inta veḷḷaṟai kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟ
ṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ śrīpañcākṣayatevaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ mātā veḷḷaṟai
k kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ pirāmaṇi centan tattai
yum veḷḷaṟai
k kaviciyaṉ tirucci
ṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
centaṉum Ivaṉ ma
kaṉ veḷḷaṟai ka
viciyaṉ centa
ṉ tillaināyakaṉum I
vaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭai
ya Ivaṉ pirāmaṇi ceṉṉitta
ḻumpaṉ tirukkaḻippālaiuṭai
yāḷum Ivvaṉaivom . Ipparicu Iv
vaṉaivarum Eḻutuka veṉṟu muṉṉi
ṉṟu paṇikkavum Ivarkaḷukku Iv
veḷḷaṟaik kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟam
palamuṭaiyāṉ śrīpañcākṣiya
num Ivaṉ makaṉāṉa śrīpañcākṣi
ratevaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉum
veḷḷaṟaik kaviciyaṉ centaṉ ti
llaināyakarum Ivvaṉaivarum mutu
kaṇṇāka Iruntu Eḻutuvittup paṇik
kavum Eḻutineṉ karaṇattāṉ pu
liyūruṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ tillai
nāyakaṉāṉ taṉmapiraya(ṉ)ṉeṉ I
vai Eṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi camma
tittu mutukaṇṇāy yiruntu viṟpi
(pi)ttukkuṭutteṉ veḷḷaṟai kavuci
yaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
śrīpañcākṣiratevaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ
eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi cammatittu vi
ṟṟum viṟpittum mutukaṇṇāka yiru
ntu viṟpittukkuṭutteṉ veḷḷa
ṟaik kavuciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉen Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
Ippaṭi cammatittu
mutukaṇṇāyirun
tu viṟṟum viṟpi
ttukuṭutteṉ
veḷḷaṟaik kavuci
yaṉ śrīpañcākṣara
tevaṉ tirucciṟṟa
mpalamuṭaiyāṉen Ivai
Eṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭi vi
tteṉ pālāciriyaṉ
(pālai) tirukkaḻuppālaiuṭaiyā
ṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭi cammati
ttu mutukaṇṇā kayiruntu viṟpit
tukuṭutteṉ veḷḷaṟaik kavuciya
ṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ cen
taṉ tillaināyakaṉen Eḻutteṉ
ṟum Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vācciyaṉ
Iḷaiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
nbha ṭṭaṉe Eṉṟum Ippaṭi Aṟive
ṉ Ātitiraiyaṉ tirukkaḻippālaiu
ṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭaperumāḷeṉṟum
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ātitiraiyaṉ tiruna
ṭṭaperumāḷ nakkaṉe Eṉṟum Ippa
ṭi Aṟiveṉ Uḻaccāṇaṉ tevaṉ vi
ṉāyakaṉeṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
tirukkaṭavūr comattiyaṉ Apimu
tticuramuṭaiyāṉ tirukkiḷāñceri
uṭaiyāṉeṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi Aṟi
veṉ vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamu
ṭaiyāṉ mātevaṉeṉ Eṉṟum
Ippaṭi Icainteṉ perumpāra
nāyaṉ tevaṉ Irācentiracoḻa
ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻutteṉṟum .
Digital edition of SII 8.709 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
